memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XSecure_KatOp KatOp, u32 KatMaskLen, u32 *KatMask, u32 ApiId)
memberdef.name: XSecure_UpdateKatStatus

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to set or clear kat mask of HNIC.

parameterdescription.para: Operation to set or clear KAT mask

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the CDO command to update Kat status in XSecure_UpdateKatStatusIpiHandler API and returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to perform TRNG KAT and health tests.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the CDO command to call XSecure_TrngKat API and returns the status of the IPI response.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the CDO command to call XSecure_TrngKat API and returns the status of the IPI response.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the CDO command to call XSecure_TrngKat API and returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to set or clear kat mask of HNIC.

parameterdescription.para: Operation to set or clear KAT mask

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to set or clear kat mask of CPM5N.

parameterdescription.para: Operation to set or clear KAT mask

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to PLM to set or clear kat mask of PCIDE.

parameterdescription.para: Operation to set or clear KAT mask

briefdescription.para: This function sets or clears KAT mask of PKI.

parameterdescription.para: Operation to set or clear KAT mask

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If set or clear is successful

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for KAT.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.0 kpt 07/18/22 Initial release 5.2 am 04/01/23 Added XST_INVALID_PARAM error code for invalid parameters am 03/09/23 Replaced xsecure payload lengths with xmailbox payload lengths 5.4 yog 04/29/24 Fixed doxygen warnings.
